notes.content:
Step 1: Locate the “Plan Year” Field
Step 2: from the drop down, select “2026”
Step 3: Locate the Client list, each client row will have a clickable button labeled as “View” Click it to open a new tab.
Step 4. In the new tab, wait 20 seconds or until data populates in the top right corner of the client profile that says “ Sync Complete”
Step 5. Close that tab, to return to the original tab and select the next clients “View” button. Continue until you reach the bottom of the page, and click the arrow to move to the next page to continue until all pages have been completed.
